feed.title: Zhengyang Song’s Blog
feed.subtitle: All those little bugs I have ever met.

entry.title: Workspace Setup
entry.content:
This shows what we need to do when we move to a brand new Linux environment.

wget proxy

vi ~/.wgetrc

http_proxy = http://localhost:1081
https_proxy = http://localhost:1081

oh my zsh

Project link: https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh

Install script: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh

Download and run the script: sh install.sh

apt source

Project link: https://mirror.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/help/ubuntu/

vi /etc/apt/sources.list

# 默认注释了源码镜像以提高 apt update 速度，如有需要可自行取消注释
deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal main restricted universe multiverse
# deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal main restricted universe multiverse
deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-updates main restricted universe multiverse
# deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-updates main restricted universe multiverse
deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-backports main restricted universe multiverse
# deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-backports main restricted universe multiverse
deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-security main restricted universe multiverse
# deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-security main restricted universe multiverse

# 预发布软件源，不建议启用
# deb https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-proposed main restricted universe multiverse
# deb-src https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/ubuntu/ focal-proposed main restricted universe multiverse

pip source

sudo apt install python3-pip

https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/user_guide/#config-file https://gist.github.com/MaHu6/228fe96b2b81c677ae5c950a6b8d55c4

mkdir ~/.pip

echo "[global]" > ~/.pip/pip.conf
echo "  index-url = https://mirrors.aliyun.com/pypi/simple/" >> ~/.pip/pip.conf
echo "[install]" >> ~/.pip/pip.conf
echo "  trusted-host=mirrors.aliyun.com" >> ~/.pip/pip.conf
echo "" >> ~/.pip/pip.conf

python virtualenvwrapper

https://virtualenvwrapper.readthedocs.io/en/latest/install.html

pip install virtualenvwrapper

vi ~/.bashrc

export WORKON_HOME=$HOME/.virtualenvs
export VIRTUALENVWRAPPER_PYTHON=/usr/bin/python3
source /usr/local/bin/virtualenvwrapper.sh

git config

proxy

https://gist.github.com/evantoli/f8c23a37eb3558ab8765

git config --global http.proxy localhost:1081

user

git config --global user.email "songzy_thu@163.com"
git config --global user.name "Zhengyang Song"

nodejs

nvm

wget -qO- 
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.35.3/install.sh | bash

nvm ls
nvm ls-remote

nvm install

npm source

https://developer.aliyun.com/mirror/NPM

npm config set registry https://registry.npm.taobao.org
entry.summary: This shows what we need to do when we move to a brand new Linux environment.

entry.title: Git Proxy
entry.content:
This article shows how to enable Proxy when using Git.

If you have enabled proxy like V2Ray on your local machine, you can use this command to set Proxy for Git:

git config --global http.proxy localhost:1081

Then when you do git clone, use the HTTP link rather than the SSH link: git clone https://github.com/songzy12/xxx.git
entry.summary: This article shows how to enable Proxy when using Git.

entry.title: V2Ray
entry.content:
This article shows how to install and enabel V2Ray proxy.

default

server

wget https://install.direct/go.sh
sudo bash go.sh

PORT:
UUID:

"log": {
    "loglevel": "warning",
    "access": "/var/log/v2ray/access.log",
    "error": "/var/log/v2ray/error.log"
  }

sudo systemctl start v2ray
sudo systemctl enable v2ray
sudo systemctl status v2ray

client

https://github.com/v2ray/v2ray-core/releases

tls

certificate

sudo apt-get -y install socat
curl  https://get.acme.sh | sh
source ~/.bashrc 

sudo ~/.acme.sh/acme.sh --issue -d songzy.cc --standalone -k ec-256

sudo ~/.acme.sh/acme.sh --renew -d songzy.cc --force --ecc

sudo ~/.acme.sh/acme.sh --installcert -d songzy.cc --fullchainpath /etc/v2ray/v2ray.crt --keypath /etc/v2ray/v2ray.key --ecc

server

{
  "inbounds": [{
    "port": 443,
    "protocol": "vmess",
    "settings": {
      "clients": [
        {
          "id": "899cbb8a-fad2-45bd-8608-8483956d641c",
          "level": 1,
          "alterId": 0
        }
      ]
    },
    "streamSettings": {
      "network": "tcp",
      "security": "tls",
      "tlsSettings": {
        "certificates": [
          {
            "certificateFile": "/etc/v2ray/v2ray.crt",
            "keyFile": "/etc/v2ray/v2ray.key"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  }],
  "outbounds": [{
    "protocol": "freedom",
    "settings": {}
  },{
    "protocol": "blackhole",
    "settings": {},
    "tag": "blocked"
  }],
  "routing": {
    "rules": [
      {
        "type": "field",
        "ip": ["geoip:private"],
        "outboundTag": "blocked"
      }
    ]
  }
}

Note: remember to change the inbounds.settings.clients.id parameter to your own value.

client

{
  "log": {
    "access": "",
    "error": "",
    "loglevel": "warning"
  },
  "inbound": {
    "port": 1080,
    "listen": "127.0.0.1",
    "protocol": "socks",
    "settings": {
      "auth": "noauth",
      "udp": true,
      "ip": "127.0.0.1",
      "clients": null
    },
    "streamSettings": null
  },
  "outbound": {
    "tag": "agentout",
    "protocol": "vmess",
    "settings": {
      "vnext": [
        {
          "address": "songzy.cc",
          "port": 443,
          "users": [
            {
              "id": "899cbb8a-fad2-45bd-8608-8483956d641c",
              "alterId": 0,
              "email": "t@t.tt",
              "security": "aes-128-gcm"
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "servers": null
    },
    "streamSettings": {
      "network": "ws",
      "security": "tls",
      "tlsSettings": {
        "allowInsecure": true,
        "serverName": null
      },
      "tcpSettings": null,
      "kcpSettings": null,
      "wsSettings": {
        "connectionReuse": true,
        "path": "/",
        "headers": null
      },
      "httpSettings": null
    },
    "mux": {
      "enabled": true
    }
  },
  "inboundDetour": null,
  "outboundDetour": [
    {
      "protocol": "freedom",
      "settings": {
        "response": null
      },
      "tag": "direct"
    },
    {
      "protocol": "blackhole",
      "settings": {
        "response": {
          "type": "http"
        }
      },
      "tag": "blockout"
    }
  ],
  "dns": {
    "servers": [
      "8.8.8.8",
      "8.8.4.4",
      "localhost"
    ]
  }
}

ws

server

{
  "inbounds": [{
    "streamSettings": {
      "network": "tcp",

client

{
  "outbounds": [
      "streamSettings":{
        "network":"ws"
entry.summary: This article shows how to install and enabel V2Ray proxy.

entry.title: Octopress 3.0
entry.content:
This article shows the basic usage of Octopress 3.0.

new post

octopress new post hello -D Ruby

build

Here we set JEKYLL_ENV=production to enable google_analytics and disqus.

JEKYLL_ENV=production jekyll build
JEKYLL_ENV=production jekyll serve

deploy

octopress deploy

source

源码和网站是在同一个 repo 的不同 branch 底下的。

git add .
git commit -m "$(date)"
git push origin source

mirror

bundle config mirror.https://rubygems.org https://gems.ruby-china.com
gem sources -l

minima

https://github.com/jekyll/minima

comments

disqus:
  shortname: my_disqus_shortname

google_analytics

  google_analytics: UA-NNNNNNNN-N

excerpts

show_excerpts: true

layouts

ls $(bundle show minima)/_layouts
ls $(bundle show minima)/_includes

header

vi $(bundle show minima)/_includes/header.html

footer

vi $(bundle show minima)/_includes/footer.html

_config.yml

title:  Zhengyang Song's Blog
author: Zhengyang Song
email: songzy.thu@gmail.com
description: >- # this means to ignore newlines until "baseurl:"
  All those little bugs I have ever met.
baseurl: "" # the subpath of your site, e.g. /blog
url: "http://songzy12.github.io" # the base hostname & protocol for your site, e.g. http://example.com
github_username:  songzy12

# Default extension for new posts and pages
post_ext: md
page_ext: html

# Default templates for posts and pages
# Found in _templates/
post_layout: post
page_layout: page

# Format titles with titlecase?
titlecase: true

# Change default template file (in _templates/)
post_template: post
page_template: page
draft_template: draft

# Build settings
markdown: rdiscount
rdiscount:
  extensions:
    - autolink
    - footnotes
    - smart
theme: minima
plugins:
  - jekyll-feed
entry.summary: This article shows the basic usage of Octopress 3.0.

entry.title: Binary Indexed Tree
entry.content:
https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/binary-indexed-tree-or-fenwick-tree-2/

We have an array arr[0 … n-1]. We would like to

  1. Compute the sum of the first i elements.
  2. Modify the value of a specified element of the array ar[i] = x where 0 <= i <= n-1.

Low Bit

int lowbit(int x) {
    return x & (-x);
}

One Dimension

int sum(int x) {
    int ret = 0;
    while(x > 0) {
        ret += BIT[x];
        x -= lowbit(x);
    }
    return ret;
}

void add(x, val) {
    while(x <= N) {
        BIT[x] += val;
        x += lowbit(x);
    }
}

Two Dimension

void add(int x, int y, int val) {
    for(int i = x; i <= N; i += lowbit(i)) {
        for(int j = y; j <= N; j += lowbit(j)) {
            BIT2[i][j] += val;
        }
    }
}

int sum(int x, int y) {
    int ret = 0;
    for(int i = x; i > 0; i -= lowbit(i)) {
        for(int j = y; j > 0; j -= lowbit(j)) {
            ret += BIT2[i][j];
        }
    }
    return ret;
}

entry.title: Segment Tree
entry.content:
Representation of Segment trees:

  1. Leaf Nodes are the elements of the input array.

  2. Each internal node represents some merging of the leaf nodes.

    The merging may be different for different problems.

Sum of given range

https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/segment-tree-set-1-sum-of-given-range/

  1. Find the sum of elements from index l to r where 0 <= l <= r <= n-1

  2. Change value of a specified element of the array to a new value x.

    We need to do arr[i] = x where 0 <= i <= n-1.

Can we perform both the operations in O(log n) time once given the array?

Range Minimum Query

https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/segment-tree-set-1-range-minimum-query/

Example

https://codeforces.com/contest/1208/problem/d

# https://codeforces.com/contest/1208/problem/D

from sys import stdin, stdout
input = stdin.readline
# print = stdout.write

# 1. the right most 0 is the index of current minimum value
# 2. we abstract the current value for all the elements to the right
# 3. Then we can do recusion

# To find the last index with value zero,
# we can use segment tree to get range minimum query with lazy propagation.

# https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/lazy-propagation-in-segment-tree-set-2/

n = int(input())
array = list(map(int, input().split()))

MAX = n * n


class Node:
    def __init__(self, val, index, s, e):
        self.lazy = 0
        # for leaf node, store the value of array
        # for internal node, store the value of interval
        self.val = val
        self.index = index

        self.s = s
        self.e = e

        self.left = None
        self.right = None


class SegmentTree:
    def __init__(self, array):
        self.root = self.build(array)

    def build(self, array):
        def _build(array, s, e):
            if s == e:
                cur = Node(array[s], s, s, e)
                return cur
            mid = (s + e) // 2
            left = _build(array, s, mid)
            right = _build(array, mid + 1, e)

            if left.val < right.val:
                cur = Node(left.val, left.index, s, e)
            else:
                cur = Node(right.val, right.index, s, e)

            cur.left = left
            cur.right = right
            return cur

        root = _build(array, 0, len(array) - 1)
        return root

    def modify(self, s, e, diff):
        # add diff to all the array elements from s to e (inclusive)
        def _modify(cur, s, e, diff):
            if cur.s > e or cur.e < s:
                return cur.val, cur.index
            if cur.s == cur.e:
                cur.val += diff
                return cur.val, cur.index

            # note here [s, mid] is wrong because that 
            # [s, mid] may be larger than [s, e]

            left_val, left_index = _modify(cur.left, s, e, diff)
            right_val, right_index = _modify(cur.right, s, e, diff)

            if left_val < right_val:
                cur.val = left_val
                cur.index = left_index
            else:
                cur.val = right_val
                cur.index = right_index
            return cur.val, cur.index
        _modify(self.root, s, e, diff)

    def query(self, s, e):
        # return the index of the minimum of array from s to e (inclusive)
        def _query(cur, s, e):
            if cur.s > e or cur.e < s:
                return MAX, -1
            if cur.s == s and cur.e == e:
                return cur.val, cur.index

            mid = (cur.s + cur.e) // 2

            left_val, left_index = _query(cur.left, s, mid)
            right_val, right_index = _query(cur.right, mid+1, e)

            if left_val < right_val:
                return left_val, left_index
            else:
                return right_val, right_index

        val, index = _query(self.root, s, e)
        return val, index


def debug(tree):
    l = [tree.root]
    while l:
        next_l = []
        for node in l:
            print("(%d, %d): %d, %d\t" %
                  (node.s, node.e, node.val, node.index), end="")
            if node.left:
                next_l.append(node.left)
            if node.right:
                next_l.append(node.right)
        print()
        l = next_l


tree = SegmentTree(array)

result = [0 for i in range(n)]
cur = 1
while cur <= n:
    val, index = tree.query(0, n - 1)
    if index < n - 1:
        tree.modify(index + 1, n - 1, -cur)
    tree.modify(index, index, MAX)

    result[index] = cur
    cur += 1
print(" ".join(map(str, result)))

Lazy Propagation

https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/lazy-propagation-in-segment-tree/

What if there are updates on a range of array indexes? For example add 10 to all values at indexes from 2 to 7 in array.

Lazy Propagation – An optimization to make range updates faster

When there are many updates and updates are done on a range, we can postpone some updates (avoid recursive calls in update) and do those updates only when required.

https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/lazy-propagation-in-segment-tree-set-2/

Given an array arr[] of size N. There are two types of operations:

  1. Update(l, r, x) : Increment the a[i] (l <= i <= r) with value x.
  2. Query(l, r) : Find the maximum value in the array in a range l to r (both are included).

Example

# https://codeforces.com/contest/1208/problem/D

from sys import stdin, stdout
input = stdin.readline
print = stdout.write

# 1. the right most 0 is the index of current minimum value
# 2. we abstract the current value for all the elements to the right
# 3. Then we can do recusion

# To find the last index with value zero,
# we can use segment tree to get range minimum query with lazy propagation.

# https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/lazy-propagation-in-segment-tree-set-2/

n = int(input())
array = list(map(int, input().split()))

MAX = n * n


class Node:
    def __init__(self, val, index, s, e):
        self.lazy = 0
        # for leaf node, store the value of array
        # for internal node, store the value of interval
        self.val = val
        self.index = index

        self.s = s
        self.e = e

        self.left = None
        self.right = None


class SegmentTree:
    def __init__(self, array):
        self.root = self.build(array)

    def build(self, array):
        def _build(array, s, e):
            if s == e:
                cur = Node(array[s], s, s, e)
                return cur
            mid = (s + e) // 2
            left = _build(array, s, mid)
            right = _build(array, mid + 1, e)

            if left.val < right.val:
                cur = Node(left.val, left.index, s, e)
            else:
                cur = Node(right.val, right.index, s, e)

            cur.left = left
            cur.right = right
            return cur

        root = _build(array, 0, len(array) - 1)
        return root

    def modify(self, s, e, diff):
        # add diff to all the array elements from s to e (inclusive)
        def _modify(cur, s, e, diff):
            # print("cur: [%d, %d], midify: [%d, %d], diff: %d" %
            #       (cur.s, cur.e, s, e, diff))
            if cur.s > e or cur.e < s:
                return cur.val + cur.lazy, cur.index

            if cur.s == s and cur.e == e:
                cur.lazy += diff
                return cur.val + cur.lazy, cur.index

            mid = (cur.s + cur.e) // 2

            # note here cur.lazy will affect [cur.s, cur.e]
            # while diff will only affect [s, e]
            _modify(cur.left, cur.s, mid, cur.lazy)
            _modify(cur.right, mid + 1, cur.e, cur.lazy)
            cur.lazy = 0

            if s - 1 < mid < e:                
                left_val, left_index = _modify(
                    cur.left, s, mid, diff)
                right_val, right_index = _modify(
                    cur.right, mid + 1, e, diff)
            else:
                left_val, left_index = _modify(
                    cur.left, s, e, diff)
                right_val, right_index = _modify(
                    cur.right, s, e, diff)

            if left_val < right_val:
                cur.val = left_val
                cur.index = left_index
            else:
                cur.val = right_val
                cur.index = right_index
            return cur.val, cur.index
        _modify(self.root, s, e, diff)

    def query(self, s, e):
        # return the index of the minimum of array from s to e (inclusive)
        def _query(cur, s, e):
            if cur.s > e or cur.e < s:
                return cur.val + cur.lazy, cur.index
            if cur.s == s and cur.e == e:
                return cur.val + cur.lazy, cur.index

            mid = (cur.s + cur.e) // 2
            if s - 1 < mid < e:
                left_val, left_index = _query(
                    cur.left, s, mid)
                right_val, right_index = _query(
                    cur.right, mid + 1, e)
            else:
                left_val, left_index = _query(
                    cur.left, s, e)
                right_val, right_index = _query(
                    cur.right, s, e)

            if left_val < right_val:
                return left_val + cur.lazy, left_index
            else:
                return right_val + cur.lazy, right_index

        val, index = _query(self.root, s, e)
        return val, index


def debug(tree):
    l = [tree.root]
    while l:
        next_l = []
        for node in l:
            print("[%d, %d]: %d+%d of %d" % (node.s, node.e, node.val, node.lazy, node.index), end=" | ")
            if node.left:
                next_l.append(node.left)
            if node.right:
                next_l.append(node.right)
        print()
        l = next_l


tree = SegmentTree(array)

result = [0 for i in range(n)]
cur = 1
while cur <= n:
    val, index = tree.query(0, n - 1)
    if index < n - 1:
        tree.modify(index + 1, n - 1, -cur)
    tree.modify(index, index, MAX)

    # debug(tree)

    result[index] = cur
    cur += 1
print(" ".join(map(str, result)))

entry.title: Prime
entry.content:
设三个质数是 x, y, z

则 $\frac{1}{x} + \frac{1}{y} + \frac{1}{z} = \frac{xy+yz+zx}{xyz} = \frac{671}{1022}$

因为上面这个式子是不存在约分的情况，

所以我们知道 $xy+yz+zx = 671​$, $xyz = 1022​$

我们可以通过 xyz = 1022 分解质因数来得出 1022 = 2 * 511 = 2 773

所以三个质数的和是 2+7+73 = 82

两点说明：1. 为什么上面那个式子不存在约分的情况 2. 如何分解质因数

上面那个式子不存在约分的情况是因为

分母 xyz 的因子只有 x, y, z 三个数

而对于分子来说，以因子 x 为例：

(xy + yz+ zx) 其中 xy, zx 均能整除 x, 而 yz 不能整除 x （因为它们三个都是质数）

所以 (xy + yz + zx) 不能整除 x； x 不是 xy + yz + zx 的因子

同理 y, z 也不是。

如何分解质因数：首先我们能看出 2 是一个因子，1022 = 2 * 511

如何分解 511: 首先 $\sqrt{511} < 25$ , 因为 25 * 25 > 511

所以我们只要尝试 25 以内的所有素因数就可以了：2,3,5,7,11,13,17,19,23

当我们试到 7 的时候发现能整除，511 / 7 = 73

为什么我们只要尝试 $\sqrt{511}$ 以内的素因数就可以了呢？

一个结论：如果一个数 n 含有素因子，则其最小的那个素因子一定不超过 $\sqrt{n}$

我们可以使用反证法，假设最小的那个素因子 $> \sqrt{n}$, 则最小的两个素因子乘起来就 $>n$ 了。

好的我们看到 x = 2，然后有

$yz = 511$

$2 (y+z) + yz = 671$

于是 $y + z = 80$

从而 $511/z + z = 80$, $z2 - 80z + 511 = 0$

套公式

$z = (80 + \sqrt{80*80 - 4 * 511}) / 2 = $ (80 + 66) / 2 = 73

$y = (80 - 66) / 2 = 7$
entry.summary: 设三个质数是 x, y, z

entry.title: Clock
entry.content:
8点30分之后参加会议，开始时手表时针分针120度角，上午结束时手表时针分针180度角。

问会议过程中时分呈90度角的情况最多多少次？

我们先就这一道题目来看怎么做，然后再扩展一些细节。

我们先搞明白在一个12小时的周期内时针和分针是怎么转的。

之所以考虑一个12小时的周期，是因为在凌晨12点时时针和分针是在表盘上12这个数字处重合的；

然后经过12个小时后，时针和分针再次在表盘上12这个数字处重合。

凌晨12点，时针和分针在数字12处重合；然后时针慢，分针快。

接下来的一个小时里，分针转了一圈，回到了数字12处；而时针从数字12走到了数字1。

在这一个小时内除开始时它们两个是没有再次重合的，因为分针始终在时针的前面。

然后在接下来的每一个小时，分针都会走一圈，而时针就走过一个数字；在此期间它们都会相遇一次。

比如1点到2点时在数字1、2之间相遇，2点到3点时在数字2、3之间相遇。11点到12点时它们在数字12处相遇。

注意，中午12点在数字12处相遇和起始时凌晨12点是一样的。我们可以把它算作下一个12小时周期内的重合。

于是在12~1, …, 1~2, 11~12 这12段里面，它们总共重合了11次。

这里我们把 “12~1 在数字12处重合” 和 “11~12 在数字12处重合” 不重复计算。

我们在最后一节里说明对于这11次重合如何计算精确的时间。

对于这每一次重合到下一次重合，时针和分针之间的角度都经历了0到180再到0这样的一个周期。

也就是说，在这12个小时里，时针和分针之间的角度总共经历了11次0到90到180再到90再到0.

回到题目，90度角最多次，就考虑会议最早开始时间和最晚结束时间。

对于这道题目我们可以以每次时针和分针重合为一个周期来看。

我们就考虑 8点30分之后第一次夹角120度 和 中午12点之前最后一次夹角180度。

首先看一眼8点30分的时候处于什么状态。

首先8点30分的时候夹角是小于90度的，也是小于120度的。

它们在7~8之间相遇到，在8~9之间还没有相遇。

之后夹角会越来越小，直至它们在数字 8~9 之间重合。然后夹角慢慢变大。从0到90到120到180到90到0。

接下来这样数数：

8~9之间重合 到 9~10重合 时：90度1次。（因为去掉了 0到90到120 之间的这次）

9~10之间重合 到 10~11重合 时：90度2次。

10~11重合 到 11~12重合 时：90度1次。（这里因为去掉了 180到90到0 之间的这次）

总共有4次，我们不需要计算具体的时间。

关于相遇的具体时间计算：分针每分钟走 360/60=6度，时针每分钟走 360/(12*60)=0.5度。

我们计算时可以从12点重合处开始计算。

比如我们如果要计算2点~3点的那次相遇，这时分针比时针多走了两圈。

速度 * 时间 = 路程

t (6 - 0.5) = 360 * 2

t = 720/5.5 = 131 分钟 = 2小时11分钟

所以差不多是 2点11分。

推论：

对于所有在 0~120 之间的角度，答案都是4.

对于在 120~180 之间的角度，答案是 5.
entry.summary: 8点30分之后参加会议，开始时手表时针分针120度角，上午结束时手表时针分针180度角。

entry.title: Indefinite equation
entry.content:
某单位订阅了30份资料分发给3个部门，要求每个部门至少9份资料，一共有多少种不同的发放方法？

上面这个题目就是求下面这个方程的解的个数：

$x_1 + x_2 + x_3 = 30$

$x_1 \ge 9, x_2 \ge 9, x_3\ge 9$

因为我们会做的题目是求正整数解的个数，使用插板法。

所以我们就要把它转化成 $x_1' \ge 1$ 这种形式。

$x_1 \ge 9 \Leftrightarrow x_1-8\ge 1$

我们就把 $x_1 - 8$ 整体看成是一个新的变量就好了。

所以上面的式子就等价于

$(x_1 -8) + (x_2-8) + (x_3 -8) = 6$

$x_1-8\ge 1, x_2-8\ge 1,x_3 -8\ge1$

然后 6 个 1 中间有 5 个空，我们选2个空插板。

答案就是 $C_52$.
entry.summary: 某单位订阅了30份资料分发给3个部门，要求每个部门至少9份资料，一共有多少种不同的发放方法？
